title: Astronaut Floating with Tether Coloring Page
seoTitle: Astronaut Floating Space Walk Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Download this medium difficulty spacewalking astronaut coloring page. Free high-resolution printable PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: In space, astronauts grow up to 2 inches taller because the lack of gravity allows their spinal column to expand.
Space suits are pressurized garments that shield astronauts from cosmic radiation, extreme temperatures, and vacuum.
Coloring astronauts stimulates dreams of space exploration, science careers, and cosmic discovery.
